## Release Notes

- Improve messaging and consolidate add to dialogs (@timmo001 - #52330)
- Move live-test indicator to badge on condition icon (@marcinbauer-ohf - #52352)
- Migrate trigger behavior (@bramkragten - #52360)
- Matter add device: change how main entity is found (@bramkragten - #52361)
- Fix raw div tag showing in Sankey chart tooltips (@MindFreeze - #52365)
- Add tags in app store too, plus show if addon is installed already (@bramkragten - #52373)

---

## HIGH IMPACT

No high-impact breaking changes are present in this release's styling-relevant diffs.

---

## MEDIUM IMPACT

### Component: `ha-card-condition-editor` (Lovelace condition editor)

**What changed:** In `src/panels/lovelace/editor/conditions/ha-card-condition-editor.ts`, the `slot="leading-icon"` content was refactored. The previous markup was:

```html
<ha-svg-icon
  slot="leading-icon"
  class="condition-icon"
  ...>
```

It has been replaced with a wrapper `<div>` containing both the icon and a new badge overlay:

```html
<div
  id="condition-icon"
  class="icon-badge-wrapper"
  slot="leading-icon"
  ...>
```

The live-test indicator has moved from a separate element into a badge (`ha-badge` or equivalent) overlaid on top of the condition icon inside this wrapper.

**What ha-lcars rule it affects:** The theme does not currently have a dedicated card-mod rule targeting `ha-card-condition-editor` by class or element name directly. However, if any theme variant or future extension targets `.condition-icon` as a `ha-svg-icon` element (e.g., in a `"ha-card-condition-editor $"` card-mod block), that selector will now fail to match because the element is no longer a bare `ha-svg-icon` with `class="condition-icon"` — it is now a `div#condition-icon.icon-badge-wrapper` containing a `ha-svg-icon`. Additionally, a `ha-tooltip` component is newly imported and used within the editor, which could introduce new overlay/z-index layering in the condition editor panel.

**Affected selectors (if used):**
- `ha-svg-icon.condition-icon` → no longer exists at that level; now `.icon-badge-wrapper > ha-svg-icon`
- `slot="leading-icon"` receiver in `ha-expansion-panel` now receives a `div` instead of `ha-svg-icon`

**Suggested fix:** If ha-lcars ever adds styling for the automation condition editor's leading icon area (e.g., in `"ha-config-automation $ ha-automation-condition-row $"` card-mod blocks), update any selector targeting `ha-svg-icon[slot="leading-icon"]` or `ha-svg-icon.condition-icon` to target `div.icon-badge-wrapper` or `div#condition-icon`. No current preamble.yaml rule is broken, but this is a pre-emptive concern for any planned automation editor styling.

---

## LOW IMPACT

### Component: Sankey / Power Sankey / Water Flow Sankey Cards

**What changed:** In all three Sankey card variants (`hui-energy-sankey-card.ts`, `hui-power-sankey-card.ts`, `hui-water-flow-sankey-card.ts`), the `_valueFormatter` method previously returned a value string wrapped in:

```html
<div style="direction:ltr; display: inline;">...</div>
```

This wrapper `<div>` has been removed. The formatter now returns a plain text string (or the result of the format function directly). This fixes a raw `<div>` tag appearing in Sankey chart tooltips.

**What ha-lcars rule it affects:** The ha-lcars theme does not currently inject any card-mod CSS into `hui-energy-sankey-card`, `hui-power-sankey-card`, or `hui-water-flow-sankey-card` shadow DOMs, nor does it target Sankey tooltip elements. No LCARS variable or card-mod selector is affected.

**Suggested fix:** No fix needed. If the LCARS theme is extended in the future to style Sankey chart tooltips (e.g., background color, text color via a `"hui-energy-sankey-card $"` card-mod block), note that tooltip text is now a plain text node rather than a styled `<div>`, so any `div`-targeting selectors inside tooltip containers would need to be removed or replaced with a parent container selector.

---
